dsl_rule.translation_notes: Condition 1: Wide-ranging bar detected as range > ATR_14 (above-average volatility bar). Condition 2: Rally and breakout above current day high represented as close > prev_high. Condition 3: Well-defined uptrend requirement operationalized as price above its 50-day MA and 50-day MA above 200-day MA (classic uptrend definition). Exit uses 20-day MA crossover as a reasonable trend reversal condition since author did not specify.

backtest_rule.reason: Condition 1: Wide-ranging bar detected as range > ATR_14 (above-average volatility bar). Condition 2: Rally and breakout above current day high represented as close > prev_high. Condition 3: Well-defined uptrend requirement operationalized as price above its 50-day MA and 50-day MA above 200-day MA (classic uptrend definition). Exit uses 20-day MA crossover as a reasonable trend reversal condition since author did not specify.

source_rule_text: Buy the breakout of the current day high after a wide-ranging bar rallies, with greater reliability expected in well-defined uptrends.
